name: Crypt Corridor
description: A long stone corridor stretching deeper into the earth. Torch sconces line the walls but have long since burned out, leaving only cold darkness. The passage ends at a heavy iron door to the south.
ambient_messages: Somewhere in the dark, a single drop of water falls with a hollow plink.
The cold air stirs, and a dead sconce creaks softly on its bracket.
A faint scratching sound skitters away down the unseen corridor.
